subcodes.first_line: The greeting that gleams from the Most Exalted Horizon, and the praise that is perfumed with the choicest musk [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: التحیه التی تتلئلا من الافق الابهی و الثناء الذی یتعطر به سحیق المسک فی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for nearness to God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @visitation Tablets
